name: Elara Myles
short_description: Tech CEO and Amelia's true heir; unaware she is Amelia's biological niece until later.
voice_style: Precise, calm bursts; controlled under pressure.

name: Ethan Cardoso
short_description: Rui's biological son using the cover identity Ethan Myles; implanted NovaBio tracker in left wrist.

name: Rui Cardoso (posing as Victor Hart)
short_description: Black-market broker who stole Victor's identity to seize Amelia's estate and vents.
voice_style: Smooth, polished, evasive; eyes dart left before lies.

name: Aunt Ines
short_description: Recognized the imposter but stayed silent for financial control.

name: Dr. Amelia Hart
short_description: Presumed dead geneticist living in sub-levels; engineered the final inheritance test.

name: Sophia Myles
short_description: Former teacher with degenerative illness; manipulated by others.

name: Clara Myles
short_description: Actress who first pushes suspicion into the open before her death.

name: Cook Maria
short_description: Loyal servant following Amelia's sealed instructions without full context.

name: Butler James Hart
short_description: Real Victor's younger brother forced into silence, documenting evidence in military shorthand.

name: Liam Myles
short_description: Artist pressured into spying through sketches before conscience shift.

name: Dr. Richard Myles
short_description: Retired geneticist whose testimony later breaks Rui's narrative.
voice_style: Often slurred, sharply technical when lucid.

name: Solicitor Pereira
short_description: Legal overseer of the clause, initially deceived by Rui's reports.
